item.name: Generate a Random Unused Drop Name

request.name: Generate a Random Unused Drop Name

description.content: Generates a random 4-word drop name using the EFF Diceware wordlist and ensures it is not already in use.

item.name: Check if a Drop Name Is Available

description.content: Check if a drop with the given ID exists. Returns 200 with availability status regardless of whether the drop exists.
